mapper.select: select u.*, r.name as role_name from user u left join role r on u.role_id = r.id where (u.username = #{userIdentifier} or u.email = #{userIdentifier} or u.phone = #{userIdentifier}) and u.status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into user (username, password, name, email, phone, role_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{roleId}, 1, now(), now())
mapper.update: update user set last_login_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, username, ip, user_agent, create_time from system_log where user_id = #{userId} and operation = 'login' order by create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from system_log where user_id = #{userId} and operation = 'login'
select count(*) from system_log where user_id = #{userId}
